title: Kdsvakd Training Lead for Dogs, 1.5M 1.8M 3M 5M 6M 10M 15M 20M 30M Long Rope Dog Leash with Carabiner Clip and Soft Padded Handle, Reflective Recall Durable Leash for Puppy, Small, Medium, Large Dog
features: Upgraded Lockable Hook: Dog Leash for medium dogs design 360° swivel and locked clasp with high grade zinc alloy, ultra strong and lightweight,to make sure that the clasp of the rope leash is secure and will not open unexpectedly, and allows 360° rotate at any time, your dogs will be able to move happily and safely around you without getting all tangled up.

Soft Padded Handle: The handle of the long dog leash is made of soft and durable EVA, which provides an amazingly comfortable push grip, protects your hand from rope burns, and allows you and your dog many comfortable walks without any trouble. We promise that the soft touch is durable and won't fall apart even with long-term use.

Bite-Resistant Dog Lead: Strong dog leash is made of sturdy nylon anti-bite climbing rope, the joint adopts fine double thread sewing. Our dog training leash is more durable than other dog training leashes. The material of the dog leash is durable and lightweight.

Rope Leashes for All Breed Dogs: Available in a variety of colors and sizes. The 1.5M/1.8M/3M/4.5M/5M/6M/10M/15M/20M/30M long puppy leash can meet different training purposes, Great outdoor dog leash rope for your dog walking, running, training, camping, hiking, sandy beach. Now you can take your pets with you on all kinds of adventures.

Good Outdoor Dog Cord: The rope is very strong and the diameter of 1/3inch(8MM) can meet small dogs, large dogs or medium dogs cats. If you are not satisfied with our dog leash for dogs, we will give you a full refund within 180 days and you do not have to return the dog leash.
description: Product Description Kdsvakd High quality dog lead for small, medium and large dogs Kdsvakd dog leads are perfect for daily walking, training, education, running, leisure and hiking. High quality dog leash: Made of nylon material, which is more durable than polyester. Longer lifetime. Thickened Handle: Improves comfort when walking the dog. Climbing Rope Material Moderate softness and strong binding ability, twisting outer skin, more wear-resistant and durable，more than 2cm double thread stitching, the pull of the suture ＞6KN Convenient Lock Latch The dog leash cable each end has a metal lock catch buckle on that can be opened by pressing. Move the button down and press it again to open the whole lock ring, which is convenient to tie and save time and prevent the dog from leaving temporarily.
